description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage called build and a job named build that runs in the glorwinger/holy-build-box-32:2.0.0 Docker image. The job should execute the following shell commands in order: /hbb_exe/activate-exec, export CC=/opt/rh/devtoolset-7/root/usr/bin/gcc, export CPP=/opt/rh/devtoolset-7/root/usr/bin/cpp, export CXX=/opt/rh/devtoolset-7/root/usr/bin/c++, cmake ., and make all. After the build, archive the resulting binary located at nwnsc/nwnsc as a job artifact. No caches, services, or conditional rules are required.
